title: the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1984.
description: the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1984.
text: REGISTERED NO. D. (D.N.)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II -Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 252] NEW DELHI, MONDAY, JULY 9, 1984/ASADHA 18, 1906 Separate paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation (1) 460 GI/84 -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Economic Affairs) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9tn July, 1984 G.S.R. 502 (E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 15 of the Government Savings Banks Act. J 873 (5 of 1 87 ^) fie' Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Post Office Time Deposit Rules, 1981, namely;-- 1.(1) These rules may be called the Post Office Time Deposit (Amendment) Rules, 1984. (2) They shall come into force on the date of lluir publica- tion in the Official Gazette. -- 2 of 4 -- 3 2. In the. Post Office Time Deposit Rules, 1981, in rule 9,— (a) in the opening portion, for the words "interest shall be allowed on the deposit", the words "interest shall be allowed on the amount uur" ^hall be substituted; and (b) in clause (c), for the words "repayment of deposit". the words "repavnicnt of the amount due" shall be substituted. [No. F. 2]26|83-NS] A. RANGACHAR1, Jt. Secy. Note , The principal rules were published vide G.S.R. No. 664(E) dated the 17th December, I US J and were subsequently amended vide G.S.K. No. 257(E) dated the 11th March, 1983.
